title: fumana laevis
intro: Fumana laevis, also known as low wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial. The health benefits of Fumana laevis include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Fumana laevis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
